name: @dromio/workflow-room-protocol
description: Shared Dromio workflow room protocol for collaboration sessions, render snapshots, hooks, and view commands.

scripts.build: (cd ../../protocols && bun run build) && (cd ../../workflow/canvas-protocol && bun run build) && node ../../../node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p tsconfig.json && bun build src/index.ts --target=node --format=cjs --outfile dist/index.cjs && bun build src/json-render.ts --target=node --format=cjs --outfile dist/json-render.cjs
scripts.check: (cd ../../protocols && bun run build) && (cd ../../workflow/canvas-protocol && bun run build) && node ../../../node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
